column1: # Mollify evaluation corpus — tab-separated: tier <TAB> name <TAB> clone URL.
#   1 = small mature libraries (baseline: expect quiet, precise output)
#   2 = medium mature, modern typing/packaging (stress types/dead-code on re-exports)
#   3 = large mature applications (scale, dynamic-dispatch false-positive traps)
#   4 = trending / less mature apps (where real dead code and duplication live)
# Clones land in eval/corpus/<name> (gitignored). Commits are pinned in corpus.lock.
